title: Classic Pigs
description: Classic Pigs restores the original Minecraft pig texture just like before the biome-based variants were added in 1.21.5.
body:
- Classic Pigs restores the original Minecraft pig texture — just like before the biome-based variants were added in 1.21.5.
- This pack removes the new biome-dependent pig colors and brings back the good old pink, chunky, classic pig we all grew up with.
